channel.title: Home on The expanse of Yaoyuan
channel.description: Recent content in Home on The expanse of Yaoyuan

item.title: CreatePostProcess
item.description: 使用命令或者窗口新建文章 hugo new posts/createPostProcess.md 新建的文章默认根目录content目录,因此新建文章相对路径会是conent/posts/createPostProcess.md 使用编辑器打开创建的文章并编辑 这里使用的编辑器是VSCODE 重启服务器（可选） hugo server hugo服务器具有热加载功能，一些静态文件才需要重启路由器 将Markdown生成Html文件 需要将Markdown生成为html文件才能展示在网页上 hugo hugo命令就是做这一步。生成的html文件存放与public文件夹 进入public文件夹，提交至远程仓库即可 git add . git commit -m "xxx" git push origin main

item.title: WordPronuciation
item.description: he的弱读 there he is = [there rui iz] who is he [hu aizi] did he = [di di] but if he = [bu di fi] but he = [bu di] what he = [wha di] food is he = [foo di zi] does he = [de zi] believe he = [believ di] is he = [i zi] what's he = [whʌ tsi] what'd he = [whʌ di] guess he = [ge si] because he = [bi cuzi] who's he = [hu zi] him的弱读 told him = [tol dɜm] aboudt hime = [abou dɜm] leave him alone = [li vɜ ma long] got him = [gʌ dɜm] give him up = [gi vɜ map] let him in = [lɜ dɜ min] want him = [wan nɜm] met him = [me dɜm] killed him = [kill dɜm] put him = [pu dɜm] them的弱读 get them = [ge dɜm] took them off = [too kɜ moff] put them all = [pu dɜ mɔl] had them = [hæ dɜm] rub them all = [rʌ bɜ mɔl] take them = [ta kɜm] put them up = [pu dɜ mʌp] rack them up = [ra kɜ mʌp] one of them = [wʌ nɜ vɜm] look at them = [loo kɜ dɜm] ate them all = [a tɜ mɔl] want them = [wan nɜm] love them = [lʌ vɜm] her的弱读 send her in = [sen dər rin] tell her = [tɜ lər] with her = [wi thər] told her = [tol dər] get her = [ge dər] call her = [call dər] like her = [li kər] let her = [lɜ dər] dangle gave her a = .

item.title: A Quick Note on Two Beautiful Websites
item.description: To me, the two most impressive websites based on blogdown are: Rob J Hyndman’s personal website. Live Free or Dichotomize by Lucy and Nick et al. I’m sure there will be more.

item.title: A Plain Markdown Post
item.description: This sample post is mainly for blogdown users. If you do not use blogdown, you can skip the first section. 1. Markdown or R Markdown This is a post written in plain Markdown (*.md) instead of R Markdown (*.Rmd). The major differences are: You cannot run any R code in a plain Markdown document, whereas in an R Markdown document, you can embed R code chunks (```{r}); A plain Markdown post is rendered through Goldmark by default, and an R Markdown document is compiled by rmarkdown and Pandoc.

item.title: Lorem Ipsum
item.description: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat. Duis aute irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum dolore eu fugiat nulla pariatur. Excepteur sint occaecat cupidatat non proident, sunt in culpa qui officia deserunt mollit anim id est laborum. Quisque mattis volutpat lorem vitae feugiat.

item.title: About Hugo XMin
item.description: XMin is the first Hugo theme I have designed. The original reason that I wrote it was I needed a minimal example of Hugo themes when I was writing the blogdown book. Basically I wanted a simple theme that supports a navigation menu, a home page, other single pages, lists of pages, blog posts, categories, tags, and RSS. That is all. Nothing fancy. In terms of CSS and JavaScript, I really want to keep them minimal.
